text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I head over to the track where Kawakami Princess
is waiting to train.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Oh, hey, Trainer! I've been waiting for you!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Heh heh heh. I've been bursting with energy
lately! So I did some thinking!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
If I take the moves I've learned from Princess
Fighter and put my own spin on them, they might
be useful in a real race!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Move number one is the Princess Drift! It's one of
Princess Fighter's signature moves, where she
comes hurtling toward a corner and then makes a
glorious sharp turn!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I know, right?! I was hoping to make your jaw
drop, so I've been practicing!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe, ever since I met you, Trainer, I've been
making huge strides in my development as a
princess!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Nothing's impossible for a princess as long as her
future prince is by her side! I'm counting on your
guidance!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Now then, it's back to drifting practice! I have to
go even faster!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to create so much friction, it'll light the
track on fire! Just like in Princess Fighter!
